# Pinned, hash-verified Python dependencies for building the docs.
# To regenerate, run from the repository root:
#   uv pip compile support/doc-requirements.in --generate-hashes \
#     --python-version 3.10 --python-platform x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu \
#     --output-file support/doc-requirements.txt
